name: GORDON the Dimensional

sheet.name: GORDON the Dimensional
sheet.background_story: The Alchemist calls from the concords. LO Bringer of Transformation beckoned a mid-aged Gordon to untether the mind and body with the spores of the depths. "The shadows of the forsaken  sow the sins of the curious." Will he be bound by Alchemy or is the future wound by fate in the Fusion of Chaos to transform his mind and body through Nature's Augmentation?

description: The Alchemist calls from the concords. LO Bringer of Transformation beckoned a mid-aged Gordon to untether the mind and body with the spores of the depths. "The shadows of the forsaken  sow the sins of the curious." Will he be bound by Alchemy or is the future wound by fate in the Fusion of Chaos to transform his mind and body through Nature's Augmentation?
